tasks.label: Clean Gallerity build and log artifacts
args: rd /s /q build 2>nul & del /f /s /q app\build\*.* 2>nul & rd /s /q app\build 2>nul & del /q build_log.log build_hotfix.log build_error2.log build_error.log build_phase3.log err4.log full_build2.log full_build.log full_build3.log 2>nul & del /q build_output*.txt 2>nul
